name: simple_c_compiler
brief: Simple C compiler, named 'scc'. This project involves creating a simple C compiler (SCC) for the C17 standard revision, targeting ARM 64-bit assembly output. The compiler supports a subset of C keywords, operators, and basic data types. It features a command-line interface with options for output file specification and verbose error reporting. The implementation should focus on basic functionality and simplicity, without a preprocessor or linking support. The compiler is single-threaded and should generate assembly code that can be compiled with clang for the aarch64 target.
